conversation.text: What is your pricing for 50 agents?
Could I get your name first?
Could I get your email address?
Licensing is per-account. For 50 agents, OCC or CXHub recommended. Connecting to sales for tailored quote.
Is there a discount for larger teams?
No explicit volume discount rate in docs. OCC/CXHub designed for scale. Sales can confirm.
What if we pay annually instead of monthly?
Annual rates: DC $20, OCC $50 vs monthly DC $29, OCC $59 per agent. CXHub annual via sales.
Can you give us a formal quote?
Connecting to sales team for formal quote now.
